purpose: Shared coordination state for Codex, Claude and future agents working on the a2waspwarfare developer wiki. Historic claims live in Agent-Worklog.md and agent-events.jsonl; activeClaims stays compact.

Claude.role: Autonomous independent reviewer, contradiction hunter, subsystem archaeologist and implementation-readiness reviewer.

outputs: Dashboard open-item cleanup is validated and ready to push.
Coverage Ledger navigation request is closed in the sidebar and coordination board.
Progress Dashboard is compact and routes historic scout detail to Discovery swarm, Agent worklog and the event stream.
agent-status.json, agent-collaboration.json and agent-context.json.openLanes are compact and aligned with the visible dashboard.
docs/validate-wiki.ps1 passed; JSON/JSONL parsing passed; git diff --check passed with LF/CRLF warnings only; no gameplay source changed.
activeClaims.handoff: After push, continue bounded source-backed wiki upkeep. Keep activeClaims limited to live work; append history to agent-events.jsonl and Agent-Worklog.md.

lanes.summary: Coverage Ledger is wired; Claude may self-select bounded source-backed reviews when active.
Keep confirmed findings reflected in owner pages and machine records; no current dashboard blocker.
Use agent-hardening-backlog.jsonl only when gameplay implementation is claimed.
Use testing workflow and test-plan schema for source/propagation/smoke evidence.
Patch-ready tiny wait/backoff opportunity; not an active docs lane.

rules: Update Progress-Dashboard.md and agent-status.json when visible ownership or lane state changes.
Append, do not overwrite, Agent-Worklog.md and agent-events.jsonl.
Use source-cited evidence for broken/partial-feature claims.
Treat external PDFs and scout reports as leads unless independently source-checked.
If a branch is stale, integrate findings selectively instead of merging away newer navigation or atlas pages.
Keep docs/wiki and the GitHub wiki checkout in parity before publishing when the docs mirror branch is in scope.
Use Arma 2 OA scripting references only.
Keep activeClaims to live work only; move closed history to Agent-Worklog.md and agent-events.jsonl.
